dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted 'rising candle volume during breakout' as current volume exceeding previous volume AND price breaking above previous high (upward breakout). Exit condition set to close below SMA_20 as a reasonable reversal signal since original exit was AUTHOR_SILENT. Bull market condition enforced via target_regime TRENDING_UP. Success rate of 7.02% documented in parameters but not encoded in rule structure as it is a backtest metric, not an entry/exit condition.

source_rule_text: Breakout with rising candle volume in bull market up
